name: Infinite Zombie Tide
short_description: Zombies, zombies, zombies. Fortunately, we still have guns to protect us and turn these zombies into resources in our backpacks.
detailed_description:
Infinite Zombie Tide is a third-person survival shooting game that combines survivor and RPG. How long can you examine in front of an endless tide of corpses?

【Game Features】

1. Zombie drop system

Obtain more powerful and higher-quality weapons by continuously killing endless zombies. Develop a survival strategy, save supplies dropped by zombies, and use them at the right time.

Collect bullets dropped by zombies to avoid being surrounded by zombies with an empty magazine.

2. Backpack system

Understand your weapons more intuitively so that you can deal with the zombie army more skillfully.

Organize your backpack so you have room for your favorite weapons.

3. Subsequent updates

Drops that are more conducive to survival.

More types of firearms.
